meaning: adj.草皮的,用草皮做的,泥炭的,赛马的,
examples: The organic content is the main factor of the physical and mechanical properties of turfy soil.
Commonly used matrix has turfy earth, coconut tree branny, pearlite, vermiculite, mix commonly use.
This article takes turfy soil in the eastern part of Jilin as the study subject, analyzing the geologic features of turfy soil on the basis of laboratory experiments.
